executive_summary: Fechamento 01h BRT consolidou manutenção operacional: Skill Surface Diet P0/P1/P2 fechada com auditoria zerada, provider auth repairs escopados em lk-ops e spiti após aprovação, Supabase LK security gate corrigido com RLS aprovado, LK Stock Inventory Hub/webhook audit com gaps, e decisão de Lucas de não instalar Agent Reach agora. Brain Health 0/0 e Improvement Score 94/100.

material_changes.change: Skill Surface Diet pesada P0/P1/P2 aplicada localmente; auditoria recurring issues=0 warnings=0.
lk-ops openai-codex auth repaired after scoped approval with backup, smoke, scoped gateway restart and readback.
spiti openai-codex auth repaired after scoped approval with backup, smoke, scoped gateway restart and readback.
Supabase security gate fixed: RLS enabled on five backup public tables after explicit approval; gate passed.

material_changes.change: Salomon XT-6 SEO/GEO package executed: FAQ Schema, PDP interlinks and theme metadata patch recorded in receipts.
material_changes.external_write_scope: Shopify/theme/content writes executed by LK Growth before this closing, not by closing job

material_changes.change: ABACT assembly email marked needs-attention; Lucas decision required before any response.

incidents.summary: spiti-atendimento and lk-finance have inherited webhook variable present by name in live child env; values not read. Requires scoped restart approval to remediate.
wacli hermes and pessoal unauthenticated; no send/pairing/sync executed.
Supabase read models updated/protected but Inventory Hub production container appears stale for newer routes; Tiny webhook route not end-to-end proved.
